title: fees.rs select_notes InsufficientFunds have total uses unchecked sum, can panic or wrap
description: fees.rs select_notes: the InsufficientFunds error path computes have via .sum::<u64>() without overflow protection. Iterator::sum panics in debug on overflow and wraps silently in release. The selection loop uses checked_add correctly but the error summary recomputes the total without matching protection. With corrupted note values (e.g. from a test harness storing synthetic u64::MAX notes) the error message shows a wrong 'have' amount or panics in debug mode. Fix: use fold with saturating_add in the have computation, matching the rationale already in the selection loop comments.
